problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
